entry.title: peace in its wake
entry.summary:
Author: thelonggoodbye

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,206Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: Sometimes you have to break things to fix them. Chris would break his relationship with Buck, but Buck's already done that. Chris can finish the job, though.

entry.title: confessional silence
entry.summary:
Author: beetlesandstars

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,423Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 128

Summary: Buck wonders, suddenly, if Eddie’s on any dating apps. Or — God forbid — Grindr. He looks up when Eddie makes a small noise. His gaze finds Eddie’s mouth first, pink and right there, before he very stubbornly reorients to Eddie’s eyes. His eyes that, suddenly, bear a heat Buck’s grown used to over the past couple of months.  “Wanna?” Eddie murmurs, tapping Buck’s hip. “After dinner?”  Heat pools in Buck’s gut, and he nods, a little dazed. “S-sure. Yeah, sure.”Or: Buck and Eddie fuck sometimes. As friends. With a self-imposed no-talking-during-sex rule. This is fine with Buck. He’s really chill about it.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Beetles and Elderflowers
entry.summary:
Author: lisaragorn

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 207,243Chapters: 23/30Kudos: 34

Summary: In a reckless act of impulse, Evan Buckley abandons his life in Pennsylvania to follow his sister and what he believes is the love of his life, Abby, to Los Angeles. Enrolling at UCLA, this irresponsible decision becomes the catalyst for an entirely new chapter, one that leads him to cross paths with the enigmatic Eddie Diaz, a young single father struggling to balance his personal life with parenthood. What begins as an unexpected friendship quickly becomes something far more complicated than either of them anticipated.

entry.title: You are my home
entry.summary:
Author: Enti13666

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 69,848Chapters: 23/?Kudos: 647

Summary: When Christopher calls his grandparents after seeing his father with a copy of his mother, he was hoping for a few weeks of peace in El Paso. What he didn't expect was for his grandparents to sue his father for custody. When his father clearly doesn't want him and doesn't show up in court, Chris does the only thing he can. He calls his Buck. Buck has never let him down before.

entry.title: Unexpected visitors
entry.summary:
Author: Ficalicious

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,143Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 120

Summary: “Well one of her old friends still lives in Hershey and you know, they talked and Maddie mentioned the pregnancy-““Still perfectly normal.”“And her friend ran into your parents at the store and told them about the pregnancy.”Buck froze.“And I mean you know, you know Maddie hasn’t spoken to them since she found out about… you know.”“The Jakeman thing.”“Yeah, yeah the Jakeman thing. She blocked their number. And even before that she didn’t ever talk to them about you really I mean- she never even told them about Rina or your leg or anything she- she’s totally been respecting your right to not want them in your life-““Chim. What exactly happened this morning?”“They must have used a new number to try and call Maddie because they got through.”“… Okay. Okay so my parents called. That’s… not great but-““They called to tell us that they’re in LA.”“They-“ Buck blinked once. Twice.He swallowed hard.“They’re in LA?” ...In which the Buckley parents come to town. What could possibly go wrong?

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: And I'm damned if I do, and I'm damned if I don't
entry.summary:
Author: Calicomarie11

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,574Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 144

Summary: Eddie wasn’t sure how he had found himself agreeing to tag along with his cousin Rafael to the Hotshots set on one of his few vacation days that were left. Rafa convinced him that even though he didn’t have an agent (or any desire to have one) and he hadn’t been hired for the gig, if he just showed up, they would let him on set. And the bastard had been right. They rolled up to the gate and went through with Rafa’s work pass, and then he was dragged before the Assistant Director, who looked him up and down, and then made a slower pass before nodding thoughtfully. “You look like you were meant to run into burning buildings. Have you ever done this before?” “Not as such, ma’am. I served two tours as an Army Medic.” “So respectful,” she said, patting his cheek, “Heather, get him set up with paperwork and then take him to Rochelle for a costume. We’re going to make a firefighter out of you today.” -------When Eddie tags along with his cousin to a TV set he finds more than an authentic LA experience.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: it all breaks down, it always does (it all works out, it always does)
entry.summary:
Author: Elgney

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,532Chapters: 4/6Kudos: 1,005

Summary: “I have no idea what’s going on.” He was embarrassed at the whiny note in his voice, but he couldn’t swallow it away. “I mean, the last thing I remember, I was telling my parents that I was leaving Texas. And then all of the sudden I wake up and it’s like—” Like some stranger named Buck had infiltrated every corner of his life. That’s what it felt like. —— Amnesiac Eddie tries really hard to hate Buck. It doesn’t stick.

entry.summary:

entry.title: Your Love is My Drug
entry.summary:
Author: thatsanovelidea

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 82,718Chapters: 18/18Kudos: 205

Summary: Buck knows it’s not sustainable by the fourth night, when he wakes up sweating and unable to breathe, one hand clutching his ribs where she’d stuck him the first time with the cattle prod and the other reaching to turn on the lamp at his bedside. It’s been one week since he got back, so four sleepless nights puts him firmly in the "more bad than good" territory. What the hell is he supposed to do about all this shit? He alluded to therapy when he talked with Eddie at work the other day, but he’s not going to do that. Therapy is totally hit or miss for him. He’s been to two therapists, one was a miss, one a hit, which means he’s due for another miss. He’s sure as hell not going to talk to Maddie about it, because that’d be, like, super triggering or something. She just got over her own kidnapping a few years ago. And who else, Eddie? Eddie had a traumatic experience in New Mexico as well; he doesn’t need to be responsible for Buck’s too. But the fact of the matter is, something’s got to change. So, Buck decides to start self-medicating. ~ or canon compliant up until s9ep14 (DIY), after that it's just angst and hurt and maybe occasional comfort

entry.title: That was a date?
entry.summary:
Author: Rhir0se

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,442Chapters: 3/4Kudos: 50

Summary: “I’m so glad you said yes this time,” Eddie said, holding Buck close. “I thought since you never actively avoided me after last time that you didn’t hate me or anything. But I was worried it’d mess up our friendship. But look at us now! We’re in love.”“Woah woah woah what do you mean last time. We’ve never kissed before; pretty sure I would remember that.”“No, we didn’t kiss. I’m talking about our date.”“What date? We’ve never been on a date. Pretty sure I’d remember that too.”“Yeah, it was a few years ago now and I took you on a date to that poker place. Remember you had you’re lightning math powers and we used them to crush everyone else. And then nothing came of it, and I figured you weren’t interested.”“That was a date?”

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: But, You’re My Idiot
entry.summary:
Author: Writeninembers

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,008Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 40

Summary: It starts at the firefighter auction. With Buck on stage.With a smile Eddie can’t return.With a feeling he doesn’t understand—and refuses to name. Because it shouldn’t matter. It’s just Buck. Right? It would be easier if it was. Some lines don’t blur.Some lines were never even there. And some feelings? They don’t stay buried. No matter how hard they try.

entry.title: no alarms and no surprises (please)
entry.summary:
Author: bubbleaurum

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,591Chapters: 8/10Kudos: 70

Summary: Hi, journal. Weird start, I don’t know how to start. I guess hi, me. This is the first entry of the journal for Dr. Copeland. I don’t really get how it will help, but she’s good at this, so this is probably good too. I didn’t tell her today, but I made the appointment because I’m lonely. I’m really, really lonely. And I don’t know how to say that out loud yet. Hopefully writing it will help. He puts the pen down and decides that’s enough effort for the first day. He checks his phone, thinking maybe he didn’t notice it buzzing while he wrote. No new messages....... Eddie’s in Texas. Maddie is getting ready for baby number 2. Bobby and Athena are building a new house. Everyone is busy with their family, and Buck doesn’t seem to fit anywhere. Dr. Copeland has him start to keep a journal to keep track of how he’s feeling, and all it does is (somehow) make everything worse. When a bad call lands Bobby in a coma and brings Eddie back everything becomes overwhelming fast. Buck starts leaning on his old habits, and it’s not long until he spirals out of control.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)

entry.title: First Steps To Are Forever
entry.summary:
Author: villayuly1987

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,676Chapters: 15/15Kudos: 27

Summary: It wasn’t supposed to be more than friendship—just support, just family, just being there. But somewhere between takeout nights, shared laughter, and long shifts that blurred into dawn, Buck realizes the truth he’s been running from: he’s not orbiting Eddie out of loyalty. He’s falling. Hard. With every small act of care—every folded sweater, every cleaned dish, every stolen glance—Buck feels himself pulled closer to a truth too dangerous to name. Because once he admits what his heart already knows, there’s no going back. Or will he slip away

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: A Year Of You And Me
entry.summary:
Author: LibbyWrites

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,255Chapters: 108/?Kudos: 75

Summary: In spite of his skepticism, Eddie decides to start journaling, following his therapist's advice. The man gives him a list of 365 prompts and questions to write about each day, to help him untangle the mess his brain has become. Under the knots, he might find much more than just peace of mind.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Listen
entry.summary:
Author: paint_my_fire

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,893Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 83

Summary: „You slept with your ex bec-“ Eddie choked on his words momentarily, „Because...of me?“ He felt that sizzling sensation behind his ribs for the umpteenth time today, as he looked at his friend´s face. Flushed and heaving, stormy ocean eyes wild and desperate. Almost... „Yes! I mean-“ Buck clasped his hand over his mouth, eyes wide. „No- n-no, of course not because of you, I mean-“ His pink cheeks deepened to a raspberry red, as he stumbled over his words and Eddie´s heart leaped at the sight. Like Icarus, it then plummeted to unknown depths. „Buck,“ Eddie interrupted him once again, calmly, too calmly. He had to control his breathing so as not to gag at the next part. „Did- did you have sex with fucking Tommy in my room?“ Buck was fiddling with his fingers. „Technically, it was my room at the time...“   OR   Eddie stumbles across some hidden truths that send him spiraling more than once, which could mean nothing

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
